title: Auralith Compat and Additions
description: Adds compatibility and additional features for the Auralith Modpack, while also functioning independently without the modpack
body:
**Auralith Compat and Additions** is a Minecraft mod designed to improve compatibility and enhance the experience of other mods, particularly Mystical Agriculture and Modern Industrialization. Its main goal is to fix missing content

This mod adds missings seeds and essence for various industrial and avanced materials includings:
- Antimony ingot
- Tungsten ingot
- Bauxite dust
- Manganese Dust
- Chromium Hot
- Kanthal Hot
- Superconductor Hot
- Titanium Hot
